---
title: "CFMG Equitable Benefit Sharing"
author: "Rhett D Harrison"
format:
        html:
                css: custom.css
        pdf: default
filters:
- collapse-output
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| label: Load_data_and_libraries
#| include: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error:   false

library(tidyverse)
library(grid)
library(gt)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(scales)
library(broom.mixed)
library(modelsummary)
library(ordinal)
library(tidytext)
library(ggwordcloud)
library(patchwork)

load("cfmg.RData")
```

## Introduction
Here we consider the equitable sharing of benefits arising from community forest management (CFM) among CFMG members.
